paragraph: The single-family market in Emerson is a real seller's market right now. With a median sale price of $825,000 against a median list price of $779,000, homes are closing at a 1.02 sale-to-list ratio and 62% of sales are going above asking. The median time on market sits at 17 days, which tells you that priced-right homes are drawing multiple offers and sellers are dictating terms. You're seeing everything from $520,000 to $1,240,000 in the mix, so there's genuine range depending on condition, lot, and location within town. If you're selling, this environment rewards you for pricing accurately from the start. If you're buying, you'll need to move decisively when you find the right property because the good ones won't sit.
